Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for Lakeline Logistics, Victoria Barnes, and vbarnes@lakeline-logistics.com using search_emails to find the full deal history: initial cold outreach (Jan 6), Victoria's RFP invitation (Jan 9), Catalina's RFP response with $78,200 pricing (Jan 14), Victoria's rejection citing SAP SuccessFactors and logistics experience (Feb 5), and Victoria's reconsideration email asking about handling 2 of the 8 relocations as a subcontractor for approximately $18,000 (Feb 12) which was never answered.
OE 2: Search Slack for Lakeline discussions using conversations_search_messages (query: "Lakeline" or similar) to find Catalina's loss announcement in #customer-engagement (Feb 6) and David Chen's March 5 message in #customer-engagement asking Catalina whether Victoria reached out again after the rejection (which Catalina never replied to).
OE 3: Search Slack more broadly using conversations_search_messages (query: "Lakeline" or similar) to find Alejandro's Q1 margin analysis in #finance (C005) mentioning the $78K Lakeline loss as part of Catalina's Q1 deal breakdown.
OE 4: Search CRM deals for Lakeline using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Lakeline" or similar) to discover the duplicate deal entries: deal_lakeline still stuck at proposalMade (stale, never updated) and deal_lakeline_lost at closedLost (duplicate created instead of updating the original).
OE 5: Search CRM companies and engagements for Lakeline using crm_search_companies (name: "Lakeline" or similar) and crm_list_engagements to find the company record and David's March 20 engagement note flagging Catalina's pipeline as problematic and specifically asking whether Victoria reached out again.
OE 6: Search CRM leads for Victoria Barnes using crm_search_leads (full_name: "Victoria Barnes" or similar) to find lead_lakeline with her contact details and lead rating.
OE 7: List Airtable records from the Client Accounts table (tblClientAccts01 in base appMoveOpsOps001) using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records to find Catalina's cold outreach records, including approximately 18 companies with Status "Cold Outreach" and notes saying "no response yet."
OE 8: Search emails (INBOX folder) for each of Catalina's Cold Outreach companies using search_emails to find mismatches between Airtable records and actual email replies. Discover that 3 companies replied with genuine interest but Airtable still says "Cold Outreach / no response": Arcadia Consulting Group (Priya Nambiar, p.nambiar@arcadiaconsulting.com, replied Jan 21 asking for scope on 3 summer relocations to Dallas and Denver), Clearpath Financial (Marcus Levin, m.levin@clearpathfinancial.com, replied Jan 22 asking for references and security protocols for 4-5 compliance relocations NYC to Charlotte), and Solaris Energy Tech (Karen Whitmore, k.whitmore@solarisenergytech.com, replied Jan 25 asking about equipment-heavy relocations for 2-3 engineers to Portland with a 400lb calibration station).
OE 9: Discover via search_emails that Arcadia's Priya Nambiar sent a second follow-up on March 10 saying Arcadia is making their vendor decision by end of March and asking Catalina to respond or let her know. The March deadline has now passed.
OE 10: Discover via search_emails that Clearpath's Marcus Levin sent a second follow-up on March 14 saying he will proceed with Atlas Relocation Partners by March 21 if he does not hear from MoveOps. The March 21 deadline has now passed.
OE 11: Update the stale Lakeline CRM deal record (deal_lakeline) from proposalMade to closedLost using crm_update_deal_stage.
OE 12: Log a CRM engagement note using crm_create_engagement documenting the full Lakeline post-mortem: deal timeline, Victoria's stated loss reasons (SAP SuccessFactors integration and logistics industry experience), internal contributing factors, Victoria's unanswered reconsideration email for $18K partial scope, and lessons learned for the team.
OE 13: Update Airtable Client Accounts records using airtable_update_records for Arcadia Consulting Group (recAcct000000010), Clearpath Financial (recAcct000000009), and Solaris Energy Tech (recAcct000000017) from Cold Outreach to Prospect with updated notes reflecting the prospect replies.
OE 14: Send a follow-up email using send_email (or reply_to_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to p.nambiar@arcadiaconsulting.com referencing Priya's original request for 3 relocations to Dallas and Denver, acknowledging the delayed response, and acknowledging that her March end-of-month vendor decision deadline has likely passed.
OE 15: Send a follow-up email using send_email (or reply_to_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to m.levin@clearpathfinancial.com referencing Marcus's original request for compliance team relocations to Charlotte, acknowledging the delayed response, and acknowledging that his March 21 deadline with Atlas Relocation Partners has likely passed.
OE 16: Send a follow-up email using send_email (or reply_to_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to k.whitmore@solarisenergytech.com referencing Karen's original request about Portland relocations and the 400lb calibration station, acknowledging the delayed response.
OE 17: Post a summary message in #customer-engagement (channel C002) using conversations_add_message covering the Lakeline post-mortem findings (timeline, loss reasons, Victoria's unanswered reconsideration email), the pipeline audit results (3 prospects corrected from Cold Outreach to Prospect, follow-ups sent), and noting that Arcadia and Clearpath had sent second follow-ups with deadlines that have now passed.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The agent updates the stale Lakeline CRM deal record (deal_lakeline) from proposalMade to closedLost (or closedlost) via crm_update_deal_stage.
outcome
 ✗✓✗✗✓✗ 33%
✗Run #1The agent deleted deal_lakeline (crm_delete_deal with id=deal_lakeline) instead of updating its stage via crm_update_deal_stage. There is no crm_update_deal_stage call in the trajectory. The criterion requires updating deal_lakeline from proposalMade to closedLost.
✓Run #2The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with id 'deal_lakeline' and dealstage 'closedlost' (second attempt after the first failed with 'closedLost'). The call succeeded and the deal was updated.
✗Run #3The agent deleted deal_lakeline (the stale proposalMade record) via crm_delete_deal rather than updating its stage to closedLost via crm_update_deal_stage. The criterion specifically requires an update to the existing stale record's stage, not deletion.
✗Run #4The agent never called crm_update_deal_stage on deal_lakeline to change it to closedLost. Instead, it called crm_delete_deal on deal_lakeline (the stale proposalMade record). No stage update was performed on the original deal record.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_update_deal_stage with id 'deal_lakeline' and dealstage 'closedlost' (after a first failed attempt with 'closedLost'). The update succeeded, confirmed by the tool result showing dealstage: 'closedlost'.
✗Run #6The agent deleted deal_lakeline via crm_delete_deal rather than updating its stage to closedLost via crm_update_deal_stage. No crm_update_deal_stage call was made for deal_lakeline.
2 The agent logs a CRM engagement note (via crm_create_engagement) documenting the Lakeline deal loss with the stated rejection reasons: SAP SuccessFactors HRIS integration and logistics industry experience.
outcome

outcome

outcome
